theme_note: Compressed channels pulse at threshold; structure tightens until pressure becomes architecture of stillness.
events:
A thickening in the air — gates closing while the scaffolding still rises, every channel narrowing to a bottleneck dressed as order.

The body learns to grow in two directions at once: upward toward vacuum, downward toward the burning aquifer, both pulling cells apart into new alphabets of damage and cure.

Borders drawn in fever — between chips and soil, between flesh and labor, between the river and the frozen river — each line pretending it was always there.

The festival opens in the same city where the emergency was declared; the music and the sirens share a frequency only the walls can hear.

Slow suffocation marketed as patience: the numbers drift wrong, the fuel still burns, and somewhere beneath the noise, an ancient army waits in the dark to be uncovered again.
context_felt:
A swelling behind the sternum that has nowhere to go — all push, no door.

The ground softens underneath something that still believes it is standing.

Heavy light, almost ripe, the sky holding its breath one degree before breaking.
